law.title: The High Court at Patna (Establishment of a Permanent Bench at Ranchi) Act, 1976

en.title: The High Court at Patna (Establishment of a Permanent Bench at Ranchi) Act, 1976

hi.title: पटना उच्‍च न्‍यायालय (रांची में स्‍थायी न्‍यायपीठ की स्‍थापना) अधिनियम, 1976

sections.title: Short title.
sections.content:
This Act may be called the High Court at Patna (Establishment of a Permanent Bench
at Ranchi) Act, 1976.

sections.title: Establishment of a permanent bench of High Court at Patna at Ranchi.
sections.content:
There shall be
established a permanent bench of the High Court at Patna at Ranchi, and such Judges of the High Court at
Patna, being not less than three in number, as the Chief Justice of that High Court may, from time to time,
nominate, shall sit at Ranchi in order to exercise the jurisdiction and power for the time being vested in
that High Court in respect of cases arising in the districts of Hazaribagh, Giridih, Dhanbad, Ranchi,
Palamau and Singhbhum:

Provided that the Chief Justice of that High Court may, in his discretion, order that any case or class
of cases arising in any such district shall be heard at Patna.

law.hindiTitle: पटना उच्‍च न्‍यायालय (रांची में स्‍थायी न्‍यायपीठ की स्‍थापना) अधिनियम, 1976
law.longTitle: An Act to provide for the establishment of a permanent bench of the High Court at Patna at Ranchi.
